svg.title: Call Center module build order — dependency map
svg.desc: A phased build sequence for the Infath call center module. Phase 0 foundations (telephony, identity, RBAC, config) come first as cross-cutting layers. Phase 1 is a thin happy-path slice from inbound call through a minimal agent desktop. Phase 2 thickens the core with full IVR, rich queues and supervisor dashboard. Phase 3 adds management reporting. Phase 4 adds WFM last. An AI layer overlays all phases.
svg.text: build first — cross-cutting, hard to retrofit
AI layer · overlay across all phases
